name: meilisearch-bridge
description: A pnpm monorepo that wraps the Meilisearch search engine (vendored as a subtree) as a Node.js addon via napi-rs, and exposes a SDK-style API matching the official meilisearch-js interface.

scripts.verify:api: pnpm --filter @meilisearch-bridge/api lint && pnpm run build:api && pnpm run test:api:ci
scripts.verify:api:ci: pnpm --filter @meilisearch-bridge/api lint && pnpm run build:api:ci && pnpm run test:api:ci
